name: seed corpus: seed/agent-datasets/<agent-name>.jsonl contains ~30 inputs per review subagent (>= 25, <= 35)
command: for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/agent-datasets"/*.jsonl; do c=$(wc -l < "$f" | tr -d ' '); [ "$c" -ge 25 ] && [ "$c" -le 35 ] || { echo "FAIL $(basename $f) has $c expected ~30" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
